query: SELECT classification, COUNT(*) as cnt, AVG(duration) as avg_dur FROM calls WHERE classification IN ('no_answer', 'voicemail') GROUP BY classification;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT classification, COUNT(*) as cnt, AVG(duration) as avg_dur FROM calls WHERE classification IN ('no_answer', 'voicemail') GROUP BY classification;
